mapper.select: SELECT * FROM PROVIDER_URL WHERE TRIM(fin_co_no) = TRIM(#{finCoNo})
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO PROVIDER_URL t USING ( SELECT #{finCoNo} AS fin_co_no, #{homepageUrl} AS homepage_url FROM dual ) s ON (t.fin_co_no = s.fin_co_no) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.homepage_url = s.homepage_url, t.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (fin_co_no, homepage_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (s.fin_co_no, s.homepage_url, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP)
